markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review growth performance and align on future SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Comparison articles are a success.** They are already ranking \#1 for high-intent queries (e.g., "Utili vs. MindTickle") and have driven a significant lift in demo bookings (from a 1/mo baseline to 6–9/mo).
  - [**A new SEO strategy is approved.** It will focus on optimizing new solutions pages for commercial keywords (e.g., "AI roleplay software") and building backlinks specifically to these pages to improve LLM rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [**Backlink pace will double to 24/mo.** This accelerates progress toward the contract's 10/mo target, compensating for a delayed start.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review & Strategic Pivot

  - [**Comparison Article Success:**](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - New articles are ranking \#1 for high-intent queries within hours of publishing.
      - [**Impact:** Demo bookings increased from a 1/month baseline to 9 (Sept) and 6 (Oct). Signups also rose, with 41 in October.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility Gap:**](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [Competitors (Hyperbound, Second Nature) outrank Exec in LLM results for key terms.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** Competitors' higher domain authority and the fact that LLMs are citing their dedicated solutions pages, not blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:**](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [The new strategy will focus on commercial keywords (e.g., "AI roleplay software") for new solutions pages.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This directly targets the LLM citation gap and aligns with the successful comparison article strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)

### New SEO Strategy: Solutions Pages & Backlinks

  - [**Keyword Roadmap:**](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [GrowthX provided a list of high-intent commercial keywords to guide new page development.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [**Action:** Exec will build the new solutions pages; GrowthX will provide on-page SEO recommendations (H1s, subheadings) to maximize ranking potential.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [**Backlink Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
      - [**Pace:** The monthly backlink target will double to 24/month to accelerate progress.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
      - [**Focus:** All new backlinks will point to the new solutions pages, building authority for the target commercial keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)

### Blog UX & Content Updates

  - [**Competitor Links:** All new articles will exclude competitor links, except for G2 reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Image Alignment:** Sean will fix image width issues in the blog layout.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Anchor Links:** Sean demonstrated how to create on-page anchor links in Contentful, improving navigation from callout boxes.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sean:**](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
      - [Fix blog image alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [Share anchor link process with the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [Review the backlink strategy document with Garrett.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [Provide on-page SEO recommendations for new solutions pages.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [Execute the new backlink strategy, focusing on commercial keywords and new pages.](https://fathom.video/share/pQvnwfJCjPQ_PnxS7vJ9XVwPf7pMoxbH?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
